root.default:
{
  "additional_tag_map": {},
  "attributes": [],
  "delimiter": null,
  "descriptor_formats": {},
  "enabled": true,
  "environment": null,
  "id_length_limit": null,
  "label_key_case": null,
  "label_order": [],
  "label_value_case": null,
  "labels_as_tags": [
    "unset"
  ],
  "name": null,
  "namespace": null,
  "regex_replace_chars": null,
  "stage": null,
  "tags": {},
  "tenant": null
}
root.description:
Single object for setting entire context at once.
See description of individual variables for details.
Leave string and numeric variables as `null` to use default value.
Individual variable settings (non-null) override settings in context object,
except for attributes, tags, and additional_tag_map, which are merged.
root.name: context

root.description:
Terraform regular expression (regex) string.
Characters matching the regex will be removed from the ID elements.
If not set, `"/[^a-zA-Z0-9-]/"` is used to remove all characters other than hyphens, letters and digits.
root.name: regex_replace_chars

root.description: Specifies the role for the CloudWatch Logs endpoint to assume to write to a user’s log group
root.name: cloud_watch_logs_role_arn

root.description: Specifies the name of the Amazon SNS topic defined for notification of log file delivery
root.name: sns_topic_name

root.description: Set to false to prevent the module from creating any resources
root.name: enabled

root.description:
Delimiter to be used between ID elements.
Defaults to `-` (hyphen). Set to `""` to use no delimiter at all.
root.name: delimiter

root.description: Specifies whether the trail is publishing events from global services such as IAM to the log files
root.name: include_global_service_events

root.description:
Additional key-value pairs to add to each map in `tags_as_list_of_maps`. Not added to `tags` or `id`.
This is for some rare cases where resources want additional configuration of tags
and therefore take a list of maps with tag key, value, and additional configuration.
root.name: additional_tag_map

root.description:
The order in which the labels (ID elements) appear in the `id`.
Defaults to ["namespace", "environment", "stage", "name", "attributes"].
You can omit any of the 6 labels ("tenant" is the 6th), but at least one must be present.
root.name: label_order

root.description: Specifies an insight selector for type of insights to log on a trail
root.name: insight_selector

root.description: S3 bucket name for CloudTrail logs
root.name: s3_bucket_name

root.description: The trail is an AWS Organizations trail
root.name: is_organization_trail

root.description:
ID element. Usually the component or solution name, e.g. 'app' or 'jenkins'.
This is the only ID element not also included as a `tag`.
The "name" tag is set to the full `id` string. There is no tag with the value of the `name` input.
root.name: name

root.description:
Additional tags (e.g. `{'BusinessUnit': 'XYZ'}`).
Neither the tag keys nor the tag values will be modified by this module.
root.name: tags

root.description:
Controls the letter case of ID elements (labels) as included in `id`,
set as tag values, and output by this module individually.
Does not affect values of tags passed in via the `tags` input.
Possible values: `lower`, `title`, `upper` and `none` (no transformation).
Set this to `title` and set `delimiter` to `""` to yield Pascal Case IDs.
Default value: `lower`.
root.name: label_value_case

root.description:
ID element. Additional attributes (e.g. `workers` or `cluster`) to add to `id`,
in the order they appear in the list. New attributes are appended to the
end of the list. The elements of the list are joined by the `delimiter`
and treated as a single ID element.
root.name: attributes

root.description:
Set of labels (ID elements) to include as tags in the `tags` output.
Default is to include all labels.
Tags with empty values will not be included in the `tags` output.
Set to `[]` to suppress all generated tags.
**Notes:**
  The value of the `name` tag, if included, will be the `id`, not the `name`.
  Unlike other `null-label` inputs, the initial setting of `labels_as_tags` cannot be
  changed in later chained modules. Attempts to change it will be silently ignored.
root.name: labels_as_tags

root.description: Specifies whether log file integrity validation is enabled. Creates signed digest for validated contents of logs
root.name: enable_log_file_validation

root.description: Specifies an event selector for enabling data event logging. See: https://www.terraform.io/docs/providers/aws/r/cloudtrail.html for details on this variable
root.name: event_selector

root.description: Specifies a log group name using an Amazon Resource Name (ARN), that represents the log group to which CloudTrail logs will be delivered
root.name: cloud_watch_logs_group_arn

root.description: Prefix for S3 bucket used by Cloudtrail to store logs
root.name: s3_key_prefix

root.description: ID element _(Rarely used, not included by default)_. A customer identifier, indicating who this instance of a resource is for
root.name: tenant

root.description: ID element. Usually used for region e.g. 'uw2', 'us-west-2', OR role 'prod', 'staging', 'dev', 'UAT'
root.name: environment

root.description:
Controls the letter case of the `tags` keys (label names) for tags generated by this module.
Does not affect keys of tags passed in via the `tags` input.
Possible values: `lower`, `title`, `upper`.
Default value: `title`.
root.name: label_key_case

root.description: Specifies whether the trail is created in the current region or in all regions
root.name: is_multi_region_trail

root.description: Enable logging for the trail
root.name: enable_logging

root.description: Specifies an advanced event selector for enabling data event logging. See: https://www.terraform.io/docs/providers/aws/r/cloudtrail.html for details on this variable
root.name: advanced_event_selector

root.description: Specifies the KMS key ARN to use to encrypt the logs delivered by CloudTrail
root.name: kms_key_arn

root.description: ID element. Usually an abbreviation of your organization name, e.g. 'eg' or 'cp', to help ensure generated IDs are globally unique
root.name: namespace

root.description: ID element. Usually used to indicate role, e.g. 'prod', 'staging', 'source', 'build', 'test', 'deploy', 'release'
root.name: stage

root.description:
Limit `id` to this many characters (minimum 6).
Set to `0` for unlimited length.
Set to `null` for keep the existing setting, which defaults to `0`.
Does not affect `id_full`.
root.name: id_length_limit

root.description:
Describe additional descriptors to be output in the `descriptors` output map.
Map of maps. Keys are names of descriptors. Values are maps of the form
`{
   format = string
   labels = list(string)
}`
(Type is `any` so the map values can later be enhanced to provide additional options.)
`format` is a Terraform format string to be passed to the `format()` function.
`labels` is a list of labels, in order, to pass to `format()` function.
Label values will be normalized before being passed to `format()` so they will be
identical to how they appear in `id`.
Default is `{}` (`descriptors` output will be empty).
root.name: descriptor_formats

root.description: The ID of the trail. (Name for provider < v5, ARN for provider >= v5).
root.name: cloudtrail_id

root.description: The region in which the trail was created
root.name: cloudtrail_home_region

root.description: The Amazon Resource Name of the trail
root.name: cloudtrail_arn
